• Procedural infinite city with day/night cycle using Three.js.
  • Auto‑scrolling camera can be overridden with WASD/arrow keys.
  • Dynamic lighting, neon accents, and simple traffic entities.
    const CHUNK_SIZE = 50;
    renderer.setClearColor(skyColor);

This page creates an endless, grid‑based cyber‑city that updates chunks as the camera moves, adjusting building and road colors to simulate a day‑night cycle. Users can pause auto‑scroll by pressing movement keys, after which the view slowly resumes forward motion. Basic traffic objects travel within each chunk and are removed when they leave the visible area.
